name: claude-plugin-linear
description: Claude Code skill for Linear issue, project, and team management with MCP integration
author: wrsmith108

scripts.setup: node dist/setup.js 2>/dev/null || (echo '[WARN] dist/ not built, using tsx (slower). Run: npm run build' >&2 && npx tsx scripts/setup.ts)
scripts.ops: node dist/linear-ops.js 2>/dev/null || (echo '[WARN] dist/ not built, using tsx (slower). Run: npm run build' >&2 && npx tsx scripts/linear-ops.ts)
scripts.query: node dist/query.js 2>/dev/null || (echo '[WARN] dist/ not built, using tsx (slower). Run: npm run build' >&2 && npx tsx scripts/query.ts)
scripts.test-connection: node dist/query.js "query { viewer { name } }" 2>/dev/null || (echo '[WARN] dist/ not built, using tsx (slower). Run: npm run build' >&2 && npx tsx scripts/query.ts "query { viewer { name } }")
scripts.upload-image: node dist/upload-image.js 2>/dev/null || (echo '[WARN] dist/ not built, using tsx (slower). Run: npm run build' >&2 && npx tsx scripts/upload-image.ts)
scripts.extract-image: node dist/extract-image.js 2>/dev/null || (echo '[WARN] dist/ not built, using tsx (slower). Run: npm run build' >&2 && npx tsx scripts/extract-image.ts)

claude-plugin.name: Linear
claude-plugin.description: Manage Linear issues, projects, and teams with MCP tools, SDK automation, and GraphQL API patterns
